concerns: minor: runReplayHarness tests use temp file-backed stores rather than ':memory:' (the harness opens its own DB by path); all four required behaviors are still verified — not a defect.
summary: All 7 criteria pass. compareToBaseline verifiably pure (no fs/clock/network); runReplayHarness has zero runGeneratorAgent/runEvaluatorAgent/createClient refs — the load-bearing no-LLM-during-replay invariant holds. Live CLI smoke tests confirm exit-0 on empty/clean corpus and exit-1 on a seeded regression with correct delta table. NonGoals respected (only 4 files; ReplayStore schema unchanged; evaluator-agent.ts/pipeline.ts/agents untouched). Full suite 2254 tests pass — no regressions.
